notes: Real news view counts are usually not public; this version uses open RSS sources and avoids paywalled links.
Add comma-separated RSS URLs to NEWS_FEED_URLS in .env.local to include TLDR-style newsletters or other readable feeds.
AI items must pass freshness and evidence-chain gates; application items need at least two anchors with one primary anchor.
First-read summaries and AI application risk analysis use DeepSeek only, not GPT; local rules are used only as fallback.

articles.title: What would it mean for Ukraine if it actually starts producing Patriot missiles?
articles.selectionReason: Open, non-paywalled RSS candidate; recent item across configured news feeds
articles.summary: 本文探讨了如果乌克兰获准生产爱国者导弹可能带来的战略影响，包括增强其防空能力和改变战场态势。值得关注的是，这标志着美国对乌克兰军事支持的重大升级，可能影响冲突的长期走向。
articles.failureAnalysis: 关键启示：技术转让和本地化生产能显著提升受援国的自主防御能力，但需考虑供应链、知识产权和地缘政治风险。

en.summary: This article discusses the strategic implications if Ukraine were allowed to produce Patriot missiles, including enhanced air defense and potential shifts in battlefield dynamics. It is worth reading because it signals a major escalation in U.S. military support for Ukraine, potentially altering the conflict's long-term trajectory.
en.failureAnalysis: Key takeaway: Technology transfer and local production can significantly boost a recipient's defensive autonomy, but must account for supply chain, intellectual property, and geopolitical risks.
en.title: What Would Patriot Missile Production Mean for Ukraine?

articles.title: First patients enrolled in record-breaking Ebola treatment trial in DRC
articles.selectionReason: Open, non-paywalled RSS candidate; recent item across configured news feeds
articles.summary: 刚果（金）伊图里地区启动了一项创纪录的埃博拉治疗试验，在疫情被宣布为国际关注的突发公共卫生事件仅六周后，首批患者就已入组。该试验测试两种药物，有望在数月内降低死亡率，目前尚无获批的埃博拉治疗药物。
articles.failureAnalysis: 关键要点：快速启动临床试验是应对疫情的核心能力，但药物效果仍需数据验证。

en.summary: A record-breaking Ebola treatment trial has enrolled its first patients in the Ituri region of the Democratic Republic of the Congo, just six weeks after the outbreak was declared a global health emergency. The trial tests two drugs and aims to reduce mortality rates, as no approved treatment currently exists.
en.failureAnalysis: Key takeaway: Rapid trial setup is critical for outbreak response, but drug efficacy remains unproven until results are available.
en.title: Fast-Tracked Ebola Treatment Trial Begins in DRC

articles.title: Fire breaks out at a pub in Bangkok, killing at least 27 people, officials say
articles.selectionReason: Open, non-paywalled RSS candidate; recent item across configured news feeds
articles.summary: 曼谷北部一家酒吧发生火灾，造成至少27人死亡。现场视频显示大火和浓烟从门口涌出。这起事件凸显了公共场所消防安全的重要性。
articles.failureAnalysis: 关键启示：公共场所必须严格执行消防安全标准，包括疏散通道和灭火设备。

en.summary: A fire broke out at a pub in northern Bangkok, killing at least 27 people. Footage shows massive flames and smoke pouring from the entrance. This tragic event underscores the critical need for fire safety in public venues.
en.failureAnalysis: Key takeaway: Public venues must enforce strict fire safety measures, including clear exits and fire suppression systems.
en.title: Fire at Bangkok Pub Kills at Least 27

articles.title: DietrichGebert/ponytail
articles.selectionReason: AI source passed freshness and evidence-chain gate: GitHub + Community signal
articles.summary: 该项目提出让AI代理模仿最懒的高级开发者的思维方式，强调不写代码才是最佳实践。它通过减少不必要的代码生成来提升效率，值得关注是因为它挑战了AI辅助编程中过度生成的常见问题。
articles.failureAnalysis: 核心风险在于“懒惰”可能被误解为低质量或敷衍，导致用户信任度下降。实际部署中，AI需要精准判断何时该“懒惰”，否则可能遗漏关键逻辑或产生安全漏洞。此外，项目缺乏明确的验证指标和用户反馈机制，难以证明其实际价值。

en.summary: This project proposes an AI agent that mimics the mindset of the laziest senior developer, emphasizing that the best code is the code never written. It is worth reading because it challenges the common over-generation problem in AI-assisted coding by promoting efficiency.
en.failureAnalysis: The main risk is that 'laziness' may be misinterpreted as low quality, eroding user trust. Without clear validation metrics, the AI may miss critical logic or introduce security flaws.
en.title: Ponytail: AI Agent That Thinks Like the Laziest Senior Dev

articles.title: Directly Responsible Individuals (DRI)
articles.selectionReason: AI source passed freshness and evidence-chain gate: No clear evidence
articles.summary: 本文介绍了“直接负责人”（DRI）的概念，即对项目成败最终负责的个人，源自苹果公司。作者认为，在AI代理（如LLM驱动的智能体）融入组织时，不应将代理视为DRI，因为只有人类才能承担问责。文章引用了IBM 1979年的观点，强调机器不能做管理决策，这为AI在组织中的角色提供了重要边界。
articles.failureAnalysis: 关键启示：AI代理可以辅助执行，但绝不能替代人类承担最终责任。在部署AI系统时，必须明确人类DRI，确保问责清晰。

en.summary: This article defines 'Directly Responsible Individuals' (DRI) as the person ultimately accountable for a project's success or failure, originating from Apple. The author argues that LLM-powered agents should never be DRIs, as only humans can take accountability. It cites IBM's 1979 principle that computers must not make management decisions, highlighting a critical boundary for AI in organizations.
en.failureAnalysis: Key takeaway: AI agents can assist but must not replace human accountability. When deploying AI systems, clear human DRIs must be established to ensure responsibility.
en.title: Directly Responsible Individuals (DRI) and AI Agents

articles.title: Clinical Translation of Brain-Computer Interface in China: A Landscape Analysis of Investigator-Initiated Trials, Registered Clinical Trials, and Regulatory Approval
articles.selectionReason: Open full-text paper; topic brain_computer_interface; quality signal passed; application scenario is clear.

paperCard.problem: 脑损伤（如中风、脊髓损伤）导致很多人失去运动或交流能力，现有疗法效果有限。脑机接口（BCI）能帮助恢复这些功能，但中国BCI从研究到临床应用的整体情况还不清楚。
paperCard.method: 作者收集了三个来源的数据：中国临床试验注册中心的134项试验、26项研究者发起的试验（IITs）和5个国家药监局（NMPA）批准的产品，然后按技术类型、疾病领域、时间趋势和地理分布进行统计分析。
paperCard.difference: 之前的研究多关注单一技术或疾病，且数据较旧。这篇论文首次把中国BCI的早期试验、注册试验和获批产品放在一起分析，覆盖了2020年后的快速增长期，给出了更全面的图景。
paperCard.innovation: 创新在于首次用统一框架量化了中国BCI的“三级转化路径”（IITs→注册试验→产品获批），并揭示了非侵入式BCI占主导、中风康复是主要方向、以及2020年后临床试验激增等关键趋势。
paperCard.implementation: 具体实现分三步：1）用关键词在ChiCTR搜索并筛选出134项注册试验；2）从PubMed、CNKI等渠道收集26项IITs；3）从NMPA数据库获取5个获批产品。然后按技术类型（如非侵入式EEG、半侵入式ECoG、侵入式微电极阵列等）和疾病分类（如中风、脊髓损伤）进行统计。
paperCard.applications: 可用于中风后康复训练、脊髓损伤患者的辅助控制（如机械臂、轮椅）、语言障碍患者的交流辅助、以及癫痫等疾病的闭环神经调控治疗。
technicalTerms: 脑机接口（BCI）：一种让大脑直接控制外部设备的技术，比如用脑电波控制电脑光标或机械手。
非侵入式BCI：不用开颅，通过头皮上的电极采集脑电信号，安全但信号质量较低。
半侵入式BCI：把电极放在大脑表面（硬膜下或硬膜外），信号质量比非侵入式好，但需要小手术。
侵入式BCI：把电极植入大脑内部，信号最清晰，但手术风险高。
研究者发起的试验（IIT）：由医生或研究机构自己组织的早期小规模试验，通常只有几个病人，主要看安全性和初步效果。
国家药监局（NMPA）：中国负责审批医疗器械的政府机构。

articles.summary: 这篇论文首次系统分析了中国脑机接口（BCI）从早期临床试验到产品获批的全链条现状，包括134项注册试验、26项研究者发起的试验和5个获批产品。它揭示了非侵入式BCI占主导、中风康复是主要应用方向，以及中国在2020年后临床试验快速增长的趋势，对理解中国BCI产业现状和未来方向很有价值。
articles.failureAnalysis: 论文主要依赖公开注册数据和已发表文献，可能遗漏未公开或未注册的试验信息。长期植入稳定性、临床工作流标准化和算法泛化能力仍是关键瓶颈，限制了大规模临床推广。

en.summary: This paper provides the first quantitative analysis of China's BCI translational ecosystem, covering 134 registered trials, 26 investigator-initiated trials, and 5 approved products. It reveals rapid growth since 2020, dominance of non-invasive systems, and stroke rehabilitation as the leading application, offering valuable insights for understanding China's BCI landscape.
en.failureAnalysis: The analysis relies on publicly available data, potentially missing unpublished trials. Key barriers like long-term implant stability, workflow standardization, and algorithm generalizability remain unresolved.
en.title: Clinical Translation of Brain-Computer Interface in China: A Landscape Analysis

paperCard.problem: Neurological injuries cause loss of motor or communication functions, and existing therapies are limited. BCI can help restore these functions, but the overall status of BCI translation in China is unclear.
paperCard.method: The authors collected data from three sources: 134 registered trials from ChiCTR, 26 IITs from literature and reports, and 5 NMPA-approved products, then analyzed them by technology type, disease area, time trends, and geography.
paperCard.difference: Previous studies focused on single technologies or diseases with older data. This paper integrates early trials, registered trials, and approved products for the first time, covering the rapid growth after 2020 for a more complete picture.
paperCard.innovation: The innovation is the first unified quantitative framework for China's three-tier BCI translation pathway (IITs → registered trials → product approval), revealing key trends like non-invasive dominance, stroke focus, and post-2020 surge.
paperCard.implementation: Implementation involved three steps: 1) searching ChiCTR with keywords to identify 134 registered trials; 2) collecting 26 IITs from PubMed, CNKI, and institutional reports; 3) retrieving 5 approved products from the NMPA database. Then statistical analysis was performed by technology type (e.g., non-invasive EEG, semi-invasive ECoG, invasive microelectrode arrays) and disease classification.
paperCard.applications: Applications include stroke rehabilitation, assistive control for spinal cord injury patients (e.g., robotic arms, wheelchairs), communication aids for speech-impaired patients, and closed-loop neuromodulation for epilepsy.
technicalTerms: Brain-computer interface (BCI): A technology that allows the brain to directly control external devices, such as using brain waves to control a computer cursor or robotic hand.
Non-invasive BCI: Uses scalp electrodes to record brain signals without surgery; safer but lower signal quality.
Semi-invasive BCI: Places electrodes on the brain surface (under or over the dura); better signal quality but requires minor surgery.
Invasive BCI: Implants electrodes inside the brain; highest signal clarity but higher surgical risk.
Investigator-initiated trial (IIT): Small early-stage trials organized by doctors or research institutions, typically with 1-5 patients, focusing on safety and initial efficacy.
National Medical Products Administration (NMPA): China's government agency responsible for approving medical devices.

articles.title: Graph-Regularized Deep Learning for EEG-Based Emotion Recognition with Psychologically-Grounded Label Structure
articles.selectionReason: Open full-text paper; topic brain_computer_interface; quality signal passed; application scenario is clear.

paperCard.problem: 现有深度学习做脑电情绪识别时，把不同情绪类别当成完全独立、等距离的标签，比如把“快乐”错分成“悲伤”和错分成“中性”都算同样错误。但心理学认为情绪之间有亲疏关系（如“悲伤”和“恐惧”更接近），现有方法忽略了这一点。
paperCard.method: 论文构建了一个情绪关系图，图中每个情绪是一个节点，边表示心理上的接近程度。然后设计了三种正则化方法（图标签平滑、图拉普拉斯损失、切片Wasserstein距离），在训练时惩罚那些把情绪错分到心理上距离远的类别的行为，鼓励模型做出更“合理”的错误。
paperCard.difference: 之前的方法要么用标准交叉熵损失（所有错误平等对待），要么用标签平滑（均匀软化标签）。这篇论文首次系统性地将情绪拓扑结构（即情绪之间的心理距离）直接融入训练目标，并且用三种不同数学方法实现，且验证了在多种模型架构上都有效。
paperCard.innovation: 创新点有三个：1）提出用图结构编码情绪心理距离，并设计三种正则化方法（从简单到复杂）来利用这个结构；2）提出“邻近违规率”指标，专门衡量模型是否做出心理学上不合理的错误；3）证明该方法在三种不同架构（纯Transformer、CNN-Transformer混合、图神经网络）上都能稳定提升性能。
paperCard.implementation: 具体实现分三步：1）根据心理学模型（如Russell环状模型）为情绪标签集构建图，确定哪些情绪相邻（如“快乐”只连“中性”）；2）在训练时，除了标准分类损失，加上一个正则化损失，该损失根据情绪图计算预测错误“代价”——错分到远距离情绪代价高，近距离代价低；3）用自适应权重自动平衡两个损失。关键技术词：图拉普拉斯（衡量图上节点间距离的数学工具）、切片Wasserstein距离（一种高效计算分布差异的方法）。
paperCard.applications: 可用于心理健康监测（如追踪情绪变化趋势）、情感脑机接口（如帮助自闭症患者识别情绪）、消费级脑电设备（如Muse头环）上的日常情绪分析，以及任何需要利用标签间结构关系的分类任务（如医学诊断中的疾病严重程度分级）。
technicalTerms: 图正则化：在训练时加入一个惩罚项，让模型预测结果符合图上定义的亲疏关系。
邻近违规率：衡量模型把情绪错分到心理上不接近的类别的比例，越低越好。
切片Wasserstein距离：一种计算两个概率分布差异的方法，这里用来衡量预测分布和真实分布在情绪图上的距离。

articles.summary: 这篇论文提出了一种图正则化深度学习框架，用于基于脑电信号的情绪识别。它通过将情绪之间的心理相似性（如“悲伤”和“恐惧”比“快乐”和“悲伤”更接近）编码到训练过程中，让模型在分类时更符合心理学理论，从而提升准确率并减少不合理错误。值得阅读是因为它提供了一种架构无关、可提升现有模型上限的通用方法。
articles.failureAnalysis: 主要局限是实验仅在4类和5类情绪数据集上验证，对于更大规模的情绪分类（如10类以上）效果未知。另外，图结构依赖心理学模型（如Russell的环状模型），如果情绪标签集不同，需要重新定义图结构。

en.summary: This paper proposes a graph-regularized deep learning framework for EEG-based emotion recognition that encodes psychological proximity between emotions (e.g., Sad is closer to Fear than to Happy) into the training process. It consistently improves accuracy and reduces psychologically implausible misclassifications across three different backbone architectures. Worth reading because it offers an architecture-agnostic method to raise the performance ceiling of standard approaches.
en.failureAnalysis: The main limitation is that experiments are only on 4-class and 5-class emotion datasets; effectiveness on larger label sets is unknown. Also, the graph structure relies on a specific psychological model (Russell's circumplex), requiring redefinition for different emotion taxonomies.
en.title: Graph-Regularized Deep Learning for EEG Emotion Recognition with Psychologically-Grounded Label Structure

paperCard.problem: Existing deep learning methods for EEG emotion recognition treat all emotion classes as independent and equally distant, penalizing misclassifying Happy as Sad the same as Happy as Neutral, ignoring psychological theory that emotions have inherent similarities.
paperCard.method: The paper constructs an emotion graph where nodes are emotions and edges encode psychological proximity. It then designs three regularization strategies (Graph Label Smoothing, Graph Laplacian loss, Sliced Wasserstein distance) that penalize predictions deviating from this emotion topology during training.
paperCard.difference: Previous methods either use standard cross-entropy loss (treating all errors equally) or simple label smoothing. This paper systematically integrates emotion topology into the training objective using three mathematically distinct approaches and validates across multiple architectures.
paperCard.innovation: Three innovations: 1) Proposes using graph structure to encode emotion psychological distance with three regularization methods; 2) Introduces Proximity Violation metric to measure psychologically implausible errors; 3) Demonstrates architecture-agnostic improvements across transformer, CNN-transformer hybrid, and GNN backbones.
paperCard.implementation: Implementation steps: 1) Build emotion graph based on psychological model (e.g., Russell's circumplex); 2) During training, add a regularization loss that computes misclassification cost based on graph distance (higher cost for distant emotions); 3) Use adaptive weighting to balance classification and regularization losses. Key technical terms: Graph Laplacian (measures distances on graph), Sliced Wasserstein distance (efficient distribution comparison method).
paperCard.applications: Mental health monitoring, affective brain-computer interfaces, consumer EEG devices (e.g., Muse headband) for daily emotion analysis, and any classification task with structured label relationships (e.g., disease severity grading in medical diagnosis).
technicalTerms: Graph regularization: Adding a penalty during training that encourages predictions to respect the proximity relationships defined by the graph.
Proximity Violation: A metric measuring the proportion of misclassifications to non-adjacent emotion classes; lower is better.
Sliced Wasserstein distance: An efficient method to compute the difference between two probability distributions, used here to measure prediction error on the emotion graph.
